entries.finding: PG-001 COMPLETED — All 9 .pg.sql.ts files now use pgTable() from drizzle-orm/pg-core. 16 tables with proper column mappings. 0 new type errors.
entries.impact: Unblocks PG-002, DC-001, DC-002, DC-003, HC-001

entries.finding: DT-001 COMPLETED — Dialog test harness enhanced with data-testid, expectedTimes. 11/11 tests pass. --conditions browser flag required for SolidJS.
schema.pg.sql.ts now imports integer from drizzle-orm/pg-core (was sqlite-core). All .pg.sql.ts files import from pg-core only.
entries.impact: Phase 1.2 complete — all schema files defined

entries.finding: Test harness needs --conditions browser flag for SolidJS render() in bun. bunfig.toml [test] section does not support conditions.
entries.impact: All future SolidJS test scripts must pass --conditions browser

entries.finding: DC-001 COMPLETED — PlatformPaths interface exists with ElectronPlatformPaths and BrowserPlatformPaths. 14 direct app.* calls remain in 5 files (constants.ts, store.ts, index.ts, logging.ts, apps.ts). Wiring work is mechanical.
entries.impact: Unblocks DC-002 execution and HC-001 execution

entries.finding: DC-002 exploration found renderer has ZERO direct Electron imports. browser-api.ts (343 lines, 291 test lines) exists but never wired. Vite dev server on port 3000 ready. Only action needed: wire installBrowserApi() in entry.tsx.
entries.impact: DC-002 execution scope is minimal — single wiring change

entries.finding: 21 of 51 window.api.* methods have browser-api.ts polyfills. 30 missing including: killSidecar, awaitInitialization, openFilePicker, saveFilePicker, openPath, setZoomFactor, getPinchZoomEnabled, readClipboardImage, resolveAppPath, checkAppExists, desktop menu actions, WSL config.
entries.impact: Browser polyfill gap inventory available for future Chrome support work
